_comment: 期刊影响因子 / JCR 分区元数据表。每年 6 月底 Clarivate 发布新版 JCR 后手动更新一次：改 impactFactor / quartile，并把 jcrYear 和 updated 改成新值。文章卡片渲染时按 journal 字段实时查这张表，所以改这里全站生效。alias 匹配规则：小写、去括号注释、去开头 the、& 视为 and。

journals.name: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy
aliases: journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

journals.name: JAMA
aliases: jama-journal of the american medical association
journal of the american medical association

journals.name: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation
aliases: archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation
